dismissalText.commentary: Ruturaj Gaikwad c Tilak Varma b Ghazanfar 22 (14b 3x4 1x6 17m) SR: 157.14

dismissalComment.html: Straight down long-off's throat and Ghazanfar is once again MI's powerplay enforcer. Quicker on leg stump rather just outside. Gaikwad backs away looking to go straight down the ground; the shot was on but he just doesn't get enough power behind it and Tilak runs to his right from long-off and after a slight bobble completes the catch

dismissalComment.html: CLEANS HIM UP! Santner has the last laugh and Safaraz is a goner. Lovely flight and dip on this from Santner. Bowls this fuller at 75.2kph on middle and leg, Sarfaraz looks for a sweep, misses and sees his leg stump pegged back

dismissalText.commentary: Shivam Dube b Ghazanfar 5 (8b 0x4 0x6 13m) SR: 62.5

dismissalComment.html: The sweep brings about the undoing of another CSK batter. Carrom ball from Ghazanfar at 89.6kph on off stump, Dube brings out the slog sweep, misses and sees his stumps in a mess. Ghazanfar celebrates and rightly so

dismissalText.commentary: Dewald Brevis c Bumrah b Ashwani Kumar 21 (11b 1x4 2x6 13m) SR: 190.9

dismissalComment.html: Ashwani gets the breakthrough! Brevis' ramp finds the fielder Short and angled across at 125kph. Brevis looks to go up and over, but can't force the pace on this one. Bumrah has to take just a few steps in from deep third. Ashwani's impressive season continues

dismissalText.commentary: Kartik Sharma c Santner b Bumrah 18 (19b 0x4 2x6 27m) SR: 94.73

dismissalComment.html: Oh, that's brilliant from Santner! Full toss around off, Kartik looks to flick it away, but hits it flat towards deep square leg. Santner moves to his left and forward and then dives in front to take it low! Santner looks like he's injured his shoulder, though. He goes off the field for treatment, but he's helped Bumrah get his first wicket of the day
